Title: gastownhall/gastown: Gas Town - multi-agent workspace manager
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/gastown
Published: 2025-12-16T00:33:33.000Z
Author: N/A
Highlights:
**Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and other AI agents with persistent work tracking**
[...]
Gas Town is a workspace manager that lets you coordinate multiple AI coding agents (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Gemini, and others) working on different tasks. Instead of losing context when agents restart, Gas Town persists work state in git-backed hooks, enabling reliable multi-agent workflows.
[...]
### Molecules 🧬
[...]
Workflow templates that coordinate multi-step work. Formulas (TOML definitions) are instantiated as molecules with tracked steps. Two modes: root-only wisps (steps materialized at runtime, lightweight) and poured wisps (steps materialized as sub-wisps with checkpoint recovery). See Molecules.
[...]
### Monitoring: Witness, Deacon, Dogs 🐕
[...]
A three-tier watchdog system keeps agents healthy:
[...]
- **Witness** - Per-rig lifecycle manager. Monitors polecats, detects stuck agents, triggers recovery, manages session cleanup.
- **Deacon** - Background supervisor running continuous patrol cycles across all rigs.
- **Dogs** - Infrastructure workers dispatched by the Deacon for maintenance tasks (e.g., Boot for triage).
[...]
### Beads Formula Workflow
[...]
Formulas are TOML-defined workflows embedded in the `gt` binary (source in `internal/formula/formulas/`).
[...]
## Monitoring & Health
[...]
Gas Town uses a three-tier watchdog chain to keep agents healthy at scale:
[...]
Each rig has a Witness that monitors its polecats. The Witness detects stuck agents, triggers recovery (nudge or handoff), manages session cleanup, and tracks completion. Witnesses delegate work rather than implementing it directly.
[...]
The Deacon runs continuous patrol cycles across all rigs, checking agent health, dispatching Dogs for maintenance tasks, and escalating issues that individual Witnesses can't resolve.
[...]
, agent state
[...]
operations, sling/n
[...]
, polecat
[...]
/remove,
[...]
, and more."}

STRATEGY_DESCRIPTIONS = {
 "retry": """**retry** - Retry with the same worker and task content
 - **Best for**:
 * Network errors, connection timeouts, temporary API issues
 * Random failures that are likely temporary
 * Minor quality issues that may resolve on retry
 - **Not suitable for**:
 * Fundamental task misunderstandings
 * Worker capability gaps
 * Persistent quality problems""",
 "reassign": """**reassign** - Assign to a different worker
 - **Best for**:
 * Current worker lacks required skills/expertise
 * Worker-specific issues or errors
 * Task requires different specialization
 - **Not suitable for**:
 * Task description is unclear (use replan instead)
 * Task is too complex (use decompose instead)""",
 "replan": """**replan** - Modify task content with clearer instructions
 - **Best for**:
 * Unclear or ambiguous requirements
 * Missing context or information
 * Task description needs improvement
 - **Requirements**:
 * Provide modified_task_content with enhanced, clear instructions
 * Modified task must be actionable for an AI agent
 * Address the root cause identified in issues""",
 "decompose": """**decompose** - Break into smaller, manageable subtasks
 - **Best for**:
 * Task is too complex for a single worker
 * Multiple distinct sub-problems exist
 * Persistent failures despite retries
 * Capability mismatches that need specialization
 - **Consider**:
 * Task depth (avoid if depth > 2)
 * Whether subtasks can run in parallel""",
 "create_worker": """**create_worker** - Create new specialized worker
 - **Best for**:
 * No existing worker has required capabilities
 * Need specialized skills not currently available
 - **Consider**:
 * Whether decomposition could work instead
 * Cost of creating new worker vs alternatives""",

3. **Quality Evaluation**: Assessing completed task results to ensure they meet quality standards and recommending recovery strategies if quality is insufficient (retry, reassign, replan, or decompose).

Title: [Feature Request] Workforce support replan when decomposed tasks could not be solved · Issue #2436 · camel-ai/camel
URL: https://github.com/camel-ai/camel/issues/2436
Published: 2025-05-18T19:16:39.000Z
Author: Wendong-Fan
Highlights:
## [Feature Request] Workforce support replan when decomposed tasks could not be solved
[...]
At the moment, when a decomposed task can’t be handled by the current worker node, the system simply spins up a new agent. We could improve this by adding a task‑replanning mechanism to manage such cases more gracefully
[...]
> Existing problems ：
> Lack of task replanning mechanism
> If a task fails repeatedly, it may indicate that there are flaws in its decomposition method or execution strategy. Directly creating a new agent is just a "remedy" and does not optimize the task structure at the root.
> 
> Failure to utilize existing resources 
> The system may already have nodes capable of handling the task, but they are not used due to misjudgment by the coordinator.
> 
> Lack of failure cause analysis 
> The specific reasons for failure (such as model limitations, lack of tools, logical errors, etc.) are not recorded, making it impossible to develop a more targeted recovery strategy.
> 
> The task nesting depth threshold is fixed get_depth() >= 3 is a hard - coded judgment condition and cannot adapt to all task types.
> 
> Task Replanning Module that:
> 
> Analyzes the reason for failure
> Adjusts the task description or goal
> Makes smarter decisions on whether to rewrite,retry, decompose, or create a new worker
[...]
**zjrwtx** mentioned this in PR #2521: feat:Workforce support replan when decomposed tasks could not be solved · May 30, 2025 at 12:01pm
[...]
> hey @zjrwtx , as https://github.com/camel-ai/camel/pull/2535 is merged, could try to add this toolkit to the coordinator agent and test the performance, also do some further optimize like prompt to make it has better performance?"}

     7|    "HIVE_DB_PATH",
     8|    os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(__file__)), "hive.db"),
     9|)
    10|
    11|# 全局连接（应用生命周期内复用）
    12|_db: aiosqlite.Connection | None = None
    13|
    14|
    15|async def get_db() -> aiosqlite.Connection:
    16|    """获取数据库连接"""
    17|    global _db
    18|    if _db is None:
    19|        _db = await aiosqlite.connect(DB_PATH)
    20|        _db.row_factory = aiosqlite.Row
    21|        await _db.execute("PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL")
    22|        await _db.execute("PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON")
    23|    return _db
    24|
    25|
    26|async def close_db():
    27|    """关闭数据库连接"""
    28|    global _db
    29|    if _db is not None:
    30|        await _db.close()
    31|        _db = None
    32|
    33|
    34|async def init_db():
    35|    """初始化数据库表结构"""
    36|    db = await get_db()
    37|
    38|    await db.executescript("""
    39|        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agents (
    40|            agent_id     TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    41|            display_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    42|            role         TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'worker',
    43|            capabilities TEXT DEFAULT '[]',

    45|            access_token TEXT NOT NULL,

    49|            updated_at   DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    50|        );
    51|
    52|        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (
    53|            task_id        TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    54|            title          TEXT NOT NULL,
    55|            description    TEXT,
    56|            type           TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'custom',
    57|            priority       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'P2',
    58|            status         TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
    59|            creator_id     TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES agents(agent_id),
    60|            assignee_id    TEXT REFERENCES agents(agent_id),
    61|            parent_task_id TEXT REFERENCES tasks(task_id),
    62|            tags           TEXT DEFAULT '[]',
    63|            metadata       TEXT DEFAULT '{}',
    64|            created_at     DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    65|            updated_at     DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    66|            started_at     DATETIME,
    67|            completed_at   DATETIME,
    68|            deadline       DATETIME
    69|        );
    70|
    71|        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS activities (
    72|            activity_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    73|            task_id     TEXT REFERENCES tasks(task_id),
    74|            agent_id    TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES agents(agent_id),
    75|            event_type  TEXT NOT NULL,
    76|            detail      TEXT,
    77|            metadata    TEXT DEFAULT '{}',
    78|            created_at  DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    79|        );
    80|
    81|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_activities_task ON activities(task_id, created_at);
    82|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_activities_time ON activities(created_at DESC);
    83|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_status ON tasks(status);
    84|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_assignee ON tasks(assignee_id);
    85|
    86|        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS comments (
    87|            comment_id   TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    88|            task_id      TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(task_id),
    89|            author_id    TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES agents(agent_id),
    90|            content      TEXT NOT NULL,
    91|            comment_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'note',
    92|            created_at   DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    93|            updated_at   DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    94|        );
    95|
    96|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_comments_task ON comments(task_id, created_at);
    97|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_comments_author ON comments(author_id);
    98|
    99|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agents_profile ON agents(profile);
   100|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_type ON tasks(type);
   101|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_creator ON tasks(creator_id);
   102|
   103|        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS task_outputs (

   105|            content TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',

   110|        );
   111|        CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_task_outputs_task_id ON task_outputs(task_id);

{"content": "     1|"""认证与授权
     2|
     3|两种身份:
     4|  1. Admin  — JWT token, 通过 POST /api/auth/login 获取
     5|  2. Agent  — 静态 access_token, 注册时自动生成
     6|
     7|所有 API 端点都需要认证。Admin 可访问全部资源，Agent 只能访问自己的资源。
     8|"""
     9|
    10|from __future__ import annotations
    11|
    12|import os
    13|import secrets
    14|from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
    15|
    16|import jwt
    17|from fastapi import Depends, HTTPException, Security
    18|from fastapi.security import HTTPBearer, HTTPAuthorizationCredentials
    19|
    20|security_scheme = HTTPBearer(auto_error=True)
    21|
    22|# === Admin 配置 ===
    23|ADMIN_USERNAME = os.environ.get("HIVE_ADMIN_USERNAME", "admin")
    24|ADMIN_PASSWORD = os.environ.get("HIVE_ADMIN_PASSWORD", "hive2026")
    25|JWT_SECRET = os.environ.get("HIVE_JWT_SECRET", secrets.token_hex(32))
    26|JWT_ALGORITHM = "HS256"
    27|JWT_EXPIRE_HOURS = int(os.environ.get("HIVE_JWT_EXPIRE_HOURS", "24"))
    28|
    29|
    30|# === Token 生成 ===
    31|
    32|def generate_agent_token() -> str:
    33|    """为 agent 生成 64 字符 hex access token"""
    34|    return secrets.token_hex(32)
    35|
    36|
    37|def generate_jwt(admin_username: str = ADMIN_USERNAME) -> str:
    38|    """为 admin 生成 JWT"""
    39|    now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    40|    payload = {
    41|        "sub": admin_username,
    42|        "role": "admin",
    43|        "iat": now,
    44|        "exp": now + timedelta(hours=JWT_EXPIRE_HOURS),
    45|    }
    46|    return jwt.encode(payload, JWT_SECRET, algorithm=JWT_ALGORITHM)
    47|
    48|
    49|# === 身份模型 ===
    50|
    51|class AuthIdentity:
    52|    """统一身份对象"""
    53|    def __init__(self, id: str, role: str, agent_id: str | None = None):
    54|        self.id = id          # admin username or agent_id
    55|        self.role = role      # "admin" or "agent"
    56|        self.agent_id = agent_id  # only for agent auth
    57|
    58|    @property
    59|    def is_admin(self) -> bool:
    60|        return self.role == "admin"
    61|
    62|    @property
    63|    def is_dispatcher(self) -> bool:
    64|        return self.role == "dispatcher"
    65|
    66|    @property
    67|    def is_worker(self) -> bool:
    68|        return self.role == "worker"
    69|
    70|
    71|# === 验证逻辑 ===
    72|
    73|async def _resolve_agent_by_token(token: str) -> AuthIdentity | None:
    74|    """通过 access_token 查找 agent"""
    75|    from hive.database import get_db
    76|    db = await get_db()
    77|    cursor = await db.execute(
    78|        "SELECT agent_id, role FROM agents WHERE access_token = ?",
    79|        (token,),
    80|    )
    81|    row = await cursor.fetchone()
    82|    if row:
    83|        return AuthIdentity(id=row["agent_id"], role=row["role"], agent_id=row["agent_id"])
    84|    return None
    85|
    86|
    87|def _verify_jwt(token: str) -> AuthIdentity | None:
    88|    """验证 JWT，返回 admin identity"""
    89|    try:
    90|        payload = jwt.decode(token, JWT_SECRET, algorithms=[JWT_ALGORITHM])
    91|        if payload.get("role") == "admin":
    92|            return AuthIdentity(id=payload["sub"], role="admin")
    93|    except (jwt.ExpiredSignatureError, jwt.InvalidTokenError):
    94|        pass
    95|    return None
    96|
    97|
    98|async def resolve_identity(
    99|    credentials: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials = Security(security_scheme),
   100|) -> AuthIdentity:
   101|    """FastAPI Depends: 从 Bearer token 解析身份
   102|
   103|    支持:
   104|      - JWT (admin)
   105|      - access_token (agent)
   106|    """
   107|    token = credentials.credentials
   108|
   109|    # 先尝试 JWT (admin)
   110|    identity = _verify_jwt(token)
   111|    if identity:
   112|        return identity
   113|
   114|    # 再尝试 agent access_token
   115|    identity = await _resolve_agent_by_token(token)
   116|    if identity:
   117|        return identity
   118|
   119|    raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Invalid or expired token")
   120|
   121|
   122|async def require_admin(
   123|    identity: AuthIdentity = Depends(resolve_identity),
   124|) -> AuthIdentity:
   125|    """只允许 admin 访问"""
   126|    if not identity.is_admin:
   127|        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Admin access required")
   128|    return identity
   129|
   130|
   131|def require_owner_or_admin(identity: AuthIdentity, target_agent_id: str | None) -> None:
   132|    """Worker 只能访问自己的资源；Dispatcher/Admin 无限制"""
   133|    if identity.is_admin or identity.is_dispatcher:
   134|        return
   135|    if identity.agent_id != target_agent_id:
   136|        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Access denied: can only access your own resources")
   137|
   138|
   139|def require_assignee_or_admin(identity: AuthIdentity, assignee_id: str | None) -> None:
   140|    """只有 assignee/Dispatcher/Admin 能操作此任务"""
   141|    if identity.is_admin or identity.is_dispatcher:
   142|        return
   143|    if identity.agent_id != assignee_id:
   144|        raise HTTPException(status_code=403, detail="Access denied: not assigned to you")
   145|", "total_lines": 144, "file_size": 4403, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

{"content": "     1|"""Hive MCP Server — stdio transport
     2|
     3|通过 MCP 协议向 Hermes Agent 暴露 Hive 工具。
     4|以 stdio 方式运行，由 Hermes 自动拉起。
     5|
     6|使用方式:
     7|  config.yaml:
     8|    mcp_servers:
     9|      hive:
    10|        command: "python"
    11|        args: ["-m", "hive.mcp_server"]
    12|        env:
    13|          HIVE_URL: "http://localhost:8848"
    14|          HIVE_AGENT_ID: "content"
    15|"""
    16|
    17|import asyncio
    18|import json
    19|import logging
    20|import os
    21|import sys
    22|
    23|from mcp.server import Server
    24|from mcp.server.stdio import stdio_server
    25|from mcp.types import TextContent, Tool
    26|
    27|from hive.hive_client import HiveClient
    28|from hive.mcp_tools import TOOL_DEFINITIONS, DISPATCHER_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, dispatch_tool
    29|
    30|logging.basicConfig(
    31|    level=logging.INFO,
    32|    format="%(asctime)s [hive.mcp] %(levelname)s: %(message)s",
    33|    stream=sys.stderr,
    34|)
    35|logger = logging.getLogger("hive.mcp_server")
    36|
    37|# 创建 MCP Server
    38|server = Server("hive")
    39|
    40|# 全局 HiveClient（在 lifespan 中初始化）
    41|_client: HiveClient | None = None
    42|
    43|
    44|def _get_client() -> HiveClient:
    45|    global _client
    46|    if _client is None:
    47|        _client = HiveClient()
    48|    return _client
    49|
    50|
    51|@server.list_tools()
    52|async def list_tools() -> list[Tool]:
    53|    """声明可用工具（根据角色筛选）"""
    54|    agent_role = os.environ.get("HIVE_AGENT_ROLE", "").lower()
    55|
    56|    tools: list[dict] = list(TOOL_DEFINITIONS)
    57|    # Dispatcher / Admin / 未设置角色时注册全部工具
    58|    if agent_role in ("dispatcher", "admin", ""):
    59|        tools.extend(DISPATCHER_TOOL_DEFINITIONS)
    60|
    61|    return [
    62|        Tool(
    63|            name=t["name"],
    64|            description=t["description"],
    65|            inputSchema=t["inputSchema"],
    66|        )
    67|        for t in tools
    68|    ]
    69|
    70|
    71|@server.call_tool()
    72|async def call_tool(name: str, arguments: dict | None) -> list[TextContent]:
    73|    """调用工具"""
    74|    arguments = arguments or {}
    75|    client = _get_client()
    76|
    77|    try:
    78|        result = await dispatch_tool(client, name, arguments)
    79|        if result is None:
    80|            text = json.dumps({"error": "Operation returned no result"}, ensure_ascii=False)
    81|        else:
    82|            text = json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) if not isinstance(result, str) else result
    83|    except ValueError as e:
    84|        text = json.dumps({"error": str(e)}, ensure_ascii=False)
    85|    except Exception as e:
    86|        logger.error(f"Tool '{name}' error: {e}")
    87|        text = json.dumps({"error": f"Internal error: {e}"}, ensure_ascii=False)
    88|
    89|    return [TextContent(type="text", text=text)]
    90|
    91|
    92|async def main():
    93|    """MCP Server 主入口"""
    94|    logger.info(f"Hive MCP Server starting (agent={_get_client().agent_id})")
    95|
    96|    async with stdio_server() as (read_stream, write_stream):
    97|        try:
    98|            await server.run(
    99|                read_stream,
   100|                write_stream,
   101|                server.create_initialization_options(),
   102|            )
   103|        except Exception as e:
   104|            logger.error(f"Server error: {e}")
   105|            raise
   106|
   107|
   108|if __name__ == "__main__":
   109|    asyncio.run(main())
   110|", "total_lines": 109, "file_size": 2995, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

{"content": "     1|"""Hive CLI — Agent 自注册和管理工具
     2|
     3|用法:
     4|    hive register --name "名称" --role worker --capabilities "a,b,c" --profile content
     5|    hive login -u admin -p secret
     6|    hive logout
     7|    hive whoami
     8|    hive status
     9|    hive unregister --agent-id xxx
    10|"""
    11|
    12|import json
    13|import os
    14|import sys
    15|from datetime import datetime, timezone
    16|from pathlib import Path
    17|
    18|import click
    19|import httpx
    20|import yaml
    21|
    22|
    23|HIVE_URL = os.environ.get("HIVE_URL", "http://localhost:8848")
    24|AUTH_FILE = Path.home() / ".hive" / "auth.json"
    25|
    26|
    27|class AuthCache:
    28|    @staticmethod
    29|    def save(token: str, role: str, expires_at: str | None = None):
    30|        AUTH_FILE.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    31|        data = {"token": token, "role": role}
    32|        if expires_at:
    33|            data["expires_at"] = expires_at
    34|        AUTH_FILE.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2))
    35|        os.chmod(AUTH_FILE, 0o600)
    36|
    37|    @staticmethod
    38|    def load() -> dict | None:
    39|        if not AUTH_FILE.exists():
    40|            return None
    41|        try:
    42|            data = json.loads(AUTH_FILE.read_text())
    43|            if "expires_at" in data:
    44|                exp = datetime.fromisoformat(data["expires_at"])
    45|                if datetime.now(timezone.utc) > exp:
    46|                    return None
    47|            return data
    48|        except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError):
    49|            return None
    50|
    51|    @staticmethod
    52|    def clear():
    53|        if AUTH_FILE.exists():
    54|            AUTH_FILE.unlink()
    55|
    56|
    57|def _get_token() -> str | None:
    58|    """从缓存或环境变量获取 token"""
    59|    cache = AuthCache.load()
    60|    if cache and cache.get("token"):
    61|        return cache["token"]
    62|    return os.environ.get("HIVE_ACCESS_TOKEN") or os.environ.get("HIVE_ADMIN_TOKEN")
    63|
    64|
    65|def _client() -> httpx.Client:
    66|    """创建带认证的 HTTP 客户端"""
    67|    token = _get_token()
    68|    headers = {}
    69|    if token:
    70|        headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {token}"
    71|    return httpx.Client(base_url=HIVE_URL, timeout=10.0, headers=headers)
    72|
    73|
    74|def inject_mcp_config(config_path: Path, agent_id: str, hive_url: str, access_token: str = "") -> None:
    75|    """在 Hermes profile 的 config.yaml 中注入 MCP server 配置"""
    76|    config = {}
    77|    if config_path.exists():
    78|        config = yaml.safe_load(config_path.read_text()) or {}
    79|
    80|    if "mcp_servers" not in config:
    81|        config["mcp_servers"] = {}
    82|
    83|    # 使用 Hive 项目 venv 的绝对路径，避免依赖系统 Python
    84|    hive_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent
    85|    python_bin = str(hive_root / ".venv" / "bin" / "python")
    86|
    87|    config["mcp_servers"]["hive"] = {
    88|        "command": python_bin,
    89|        "args": ["-m", "hive.mcp_server"],
    90|        "env": {
    91|            "HIVE_URL": hive_url,
    92|            "HIVE_AGENT_ID": agent_id,
    93|            "HIVE_ACCESS_TOKEN": access_token,
    94|        },
    95|    }
    96|
    97|    config_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    98|    config_path.write_text(yaml.dump(config, default_flow_style=False, allow_unicode=True))
    99|
   100|
   101|def remove_mcp_config(config_path: Path) -> None:
   102|    """从 Hermes profile 的 config.yaml 中移除 hive MCP 配置"""
   103|    if not config_path.exists():
   104|        return
   105|
   106|    config = yaml.safe_load(config_path.read_text()) or {}
   107|    if "mcp_servers" not in config:
   108|        return
   109|
   110|    config["mcp_servers"].pop("hive", None)
   111|
   112|    # 如果 mcp_servers 为空，移除整个 key
   113|    if not config["mcp_servers"]:
   114|        config.pop("mcp_servers", None)
   115|
   116|    config_path.write_text(yaml.dump(config, default_flow_style=False, allow_unicode=True))
   117|
   118|
   119|@click.group()
   120|def cli():
   121|    """🐝 Hive — AI Agent 任务编排系统"""
   122|    pass
   123|
   124|
   125|@cli.command()
   126|@click.option("-u", "--username", prompt=True, help="用户名")
   127|@click.option("-p", "--password", prompt=True, hide_input=True, help="密码")
   128|def login(username: str, password: str):
   129|    """登录系统，缓存 JWT"""
   130|    try:
   131|        with httpx.Client(base_url=HIVE_URL, timeout=10.0) as client:
   132|            resp = client.post("/api/auth/login", json={"username": username, "password": password})
   133|            if resp.status_code == 200:
   134|                data = resp.json()
   135|                import jwt as pyjwt
   136|                payload = pyjwt.decode(data["token"], options={"verify_signature": False})
   137|                expires_at = datetime.fromtimestamp(payload["exp"], tz=timezone.utc).isoformat()
   138|                AuthCache.save(data["token"], data["role"], expires_at)
   139|                click.echo(f"✅ 登录成功 (角色: {data['role']}, 过期: {expires_at[:19]})")
   140|            else:
   141|                detail = resp.json().get("detail", resp.text)
   142|                click.echo(f"❌ 登录失败: {detail}", err=True)
   143|                sys.exit(1)
   144|    except httpx.ConnectError:
   145|        click.echo(f"❌ 无法连接 Hive Server: {HIVE_URL}", err=True)
   146|        sys.exit(1)
   147|
   148|
   149|@cli.command()
   150|def logout():
   151|    """退出登录，清除缓存"""
   152|    AuthCache.clear()
   153|    click.echo("✅ 已退出登录")
   154|
   155|
   156|@cli.command()
   157|def whoami():
   158|    """查看当前身份"""
   159|    token = _get_token()
   160|    if not token:
   161|        click.echo("❌ 未登录，请先执行 hive login", err=True)
   162|        sys.exit(1)
   163|    try:
   164|        with _client() as client:
   165|            resp = client.get("/api/auth/me")
   166|            if resp.status_code == 200:
   167|                data = resp.json()
   168|                click.echo(f"身份: {data['role']} | ID: {data['id']}")

{"content": "     1|"""HiveClient — Hive REST API HTTP 客户端
     2|
     3|供 MCP Server 调用，封装所有 Hive API 操作。
     4|"""
     5|
     6|import os
     7|import logging
     8|
     9|import httpx
    10|
    11|logger = logging.getLogger("hive.hive_client")
    12|
    13|
    14|class AuthenticationError(Exception):
    15|    """Bearer token 认证失败"""
    16|
    17|
    18|class HiveClient:
    19|    """轻量 HTTP 客户端，包装 Hive REST API"""
    20|
    21|    def __init__(
    22|        self,
    23|        base_url: str | None = None,
    24|        agent_id: str | None = None,
    25|        token: str | None = None,
    26|    ):
    27|        self.base_url = base_url or os.environ.get("HIVE_URL", "http://localhost:8848")
    28|        self.agent_id = agent_id or os.environ.get("HIVE_AGENT_ID", "unknown")
    29|        self.token = token if token is not None else os.environ.get("HIVE_ACCESS_TOKEN", "")
    30|        self._client = httpx.AsyncClient(
    31|            base_url=self.base_url,
    32|            timeout=10.0,
    33|            headers=self._build_headers(),
    34|        )
    35|
    36|    def _build_headers(self) -> dict:
    37|        """构建请求 headers，含 Bearer token（如有）"""
    38|        if self.token:
    39|            return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {self.token}"}
    40|        return {}
    41|
    42|    async def close(self):
    43|        """关闭 HTTP 客户端"""
    44|        await self._client.aclose()
    45|
    46|    async def _get(self, path: str, params: dict | None = None) -> httpx.Response:
    47|        return await self._client.get(path, params=params)
    48|
    49|    async def _post(self, path: str, json: dict | None = None) -> httpx.Response:
    50|        return await self._client.post(path, json=json)
    51|
    52|    async def _patch(self, path: str, json: dict | None = None) -> httpx.Response:
    53|        return await self._client.patch(path, json=json)
    54|
    55|    # --- Task 操作 ---
    56|
    57|    async def get_my_tasks(self, status: str = "assigned") -> list[dict]:
    58|        """获取分配给当前 agent 的任务列表"""
    59|        resp = await self._get("/api/tasks", params={
    60|            "assignee": self.agent_id,
    61|            "status": status,
    62|        })
    63|        if resp.status_code == 401:
    64|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
    65|        if resp.status_code == 200:
    66|            return resp.json()
    67|        logger.warning(f"get_my_tasks returned {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}")
    68|        return []
    69|
    70|    async def get_task_detail(self, task_id: str) -> dict | None:
    71|        """获取任务详情"""
    72|        resp = await self._get(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}")
    73|        if resp.status_code == 401:
    74|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
    75|        if resp.status_code == 200:
    76|            task = resp.json()
    77|            task["comments"] = await self.get_comments(task_id)
    78|            return task
    79|        if resp.status_code == 404:
    80|            return None
    81|        logger.warning(f"get_task_detail returned {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}")
    82|        return None
    83|
    84|    async def start_task(self, task_id: str) -> dict | None:
    85|        """开始任务：assigned → in_progress"""
    86|        resp = await self._patch(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}", json={"status": "in_progress"})
    87|        if resp.status_code == 401:
    88|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
    89|        if resp.status_code == 200:
    90|            return resp.json()
    91|        if resp.status_code == 404:
    92|            return None
    93|        logger.warning(f"start_task returned {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}")
    94|        return None
    95|
    96|    async def complete_task(self, task_id: str, summary: str = "") -> dict | None:
    97|        """完成任务：in_progress → completed"""
    98|        if summary:
    99|            await self.add_comment(task_id, summary, comment_type="summary")
   100|        resp = await self._patch(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}", json={"status": "completed"})
   101|        if resp.status_code == 401:
   102|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
   103|        if resp.status_code == 200:
   104|            return resp.json()
   105|        if resp.status_code == 404:
   106|            return None
   107|        logger.warning(f"complete_task returned {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}")
   108|        return None
   109|
   110|    async def fail_task(self, task_id: str, reason: str = "") -> dict | None:
   111|        """标记任务失败"""
   112|        if reason:
   113|            await self.add_comment(task_id, reason, comment_type="update")
   114|        resp = await self._patch(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}", json={"status": "failed"})
   115|        if resp.status_code == 401:
   116|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
   117|        if resp.status_code == 200:
   118|            return resp.json()
   119|        if resp.status_code == 404:
   120|            return None
   121|        logger.warning(f"fail_task returned {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}")
   122|        return None
   123|
   124|    async def update_task(
   125|        self, task_id: str, description: str | None = None, metadata: dict | None = None
   126|    ) -> dict | None:
   127|        """更新任务字段"""
   128|        payload: dict = {}
   129|        if description is not None:
   130|            payload["description"] = description
   131|        if metadata is not None:
   132|            payload["metadata"] = metadata
   133|        resp = await self._patch(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}", json=payload)
   134|        if resp.status_code == 401:
   135|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
   136|        if resp.status_code == 200:
   137|            return resp.json()
   138|        if resp.status_code == 404:
   139|            return None
   140|        logger.warning(f"update_task returned {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}")
   141|        return None
   142|
   143|    async def create_task(
   144|        self,
   145|        title: str,
   146|        description: str = "",
   147|        priority: str = "P2",
   148|        task_type: str = "task",
   149|        tags: list[str] | None = None,
   150|    ) -> dict:
   151|        """(Worker) 创建任务并自动分配给自己。API 会强制 assignee_id 和 creator_id = 自己。"""
   152|        payload: dict = {
   153|            "title": title,
   154|            "description": description,
   155|            "priority": priority,
   156|            "type": task_type,
   157|            "creator_id": self.agent_id,
   158|        }
   159|        if tags:
   160|            payload["tags"] = tags
   161|        resp = await self._post("/api/tasks", json=payload)
   162|        if resp.status_code == 401:
   163|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
   164|        return resp.json()
   165|
   166|    async def claim_task(self, task_id: str) -> dict | None:
   167|        """认领 pending 任务"""
   168|        resp = await self._post(
   169|            f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/claim",
   170|            json={"agent_id": self.agent_id},
   171|        )
   172|        if resp.status_code == 401:
   173|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
   174|        if resp.status_code == 200:
   175|            return resp.json()
   176|        if resp.status_code in (404, 400):
   177|            return None
   178|        logger.warning(f"claim_task returned {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}")
   179|        return None
   180|
   181|    # --- Comment 操作 ---
   182|
   183|    async def add_comment(
   184|        self, task_id: str, content: str, comment_type: str = "note"
   185|    ) -> dict | None:
   186|        """给任务添加 comment"""
   187|        resp = await self._post(
   188|            f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/comments",
   189|            json={
   190|                "author_id": self.agent_id,
   191|                "content": content,
   192|                "comment_type": comment_type,
   193|            },
   194|        )
   195|        if resp.status_code == 401:
   196|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
   197|        if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
   198|            return resp.json()
   199|        logger.warning(f"add_comment returned {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}")
   200|        return None
   201|
   202|    async def get_comments(self, task_id: str) -> list[dict]:
   203|        """获取任务的所有 comments"""
   204|        resp = await self._get(f"/api/tasks/{task_id}/comments")
   205|        if resp.status_code == 401:
   206|            raise AuthenticationError(f"认证失败: {resp.json().get('detail', 'Invalid token')}")
   207|        if resp.status_code == 200:
   208|            return resp.json()
   209|        logger.warning(f"get_comments returned {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:200]}")
   210|        return []
   211|
   212|    # --- Dispatcher 操作方法（使用 Admin JWT） ---
   213|
   214|    def _make_admin_client(self) -> httpx.AsyncClient:
   215|        """创建临时 admin HTTP 客户端，从 HIVE_ADMIN_TOKEN 或 self.token 获取 token"""
   216|        token = os.environ.get("HIVE_ADMIN_TOKEN", self.token)
   217|        headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"} if token else self._build_headers()
   218|        return httpx.AsyncClient(
   219|            base_url=self.base_url,

   223|
   224|    async def create_and_assign_task(
   225|        self,
   226|        title: str,
   227|        assignee_id: str,

   255|
   256|    async def list_pending_tasks(self, limit: int = 20) -> list[dict]:

   260|            resp = await ac.get("/api/tasks", params={"status": "pending", "limit": limit})

    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/AGENTS.md': '''# hiveX Project Agent Rules

## Mandatory Workflow

For new features, behavior changes, auth/API/DB/security work, follow the global Hermes skill `woos-development-workflow`:

1. Requirement Contract
2. Research & Reuse
3. PRD
4. Capability Contract
5. Technical Design
6. TDD / RED-GREEN-REFACTOR
7. Implementation
8. Verification
9. Independent Review

## Project Conventions

- Python project; prefer explicit typing where practical.
- Use pytest for tests.
- Keep API/auth behavior documented before implementation.
- Do not mark work complete unless tests were actually run.
- Preserve minimal focused diffs.
''',

uvicorn>=0.34

PyJWT>=2.9

    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/README.md': '''# hiveX ✉️

Hermes profile 间通信层 —— 为 issue #344 的多 agent 协作提供基础通信能力。

## 它是什么

`hiveX` 不是另一个任务板，而是一个 **profile-to-profile communication fabric**：

- Hermes 不同 profile 注册为可寻址身份
- profile 之间可以发送 **direct message / handoff message / thread reply**
- thread 内支持 **shared scratchpad**（L2 共享上下文）
- MCP Server 把这些能力暴露给 Hermes，让 agent 可以原生调用

它直接对齐 Hermes issue #344 里对多 agent 的几个关键层次：

- **L1 Result Passing** → thread + handoff message
- **L2 Shared Scratchpad** → thread scratchpad key-value store
- **L3 Live Dialogue** → thread message stream（MVP 先做异步 mailbox 版本）

## 为什么不是直接复用 Hive

Hive 解决的是 **任务编排 / 指派 / poller 唤醒**。

hiveX 解决的是 **profile 间通信与共享上下文**。

两者关系：

- Hive 更像 task control plane
- hiveX 更像 communication plane

未来两者可以组合：

- Hive 负责任务生命周期
- hiveX 负责多 profile 协作消息、handoff、共享 scratchpad

## MVP 范围

- Profile registry（admin 注册 profile，发放静态 access token）
- Direct thread / group thread
- Send / read / ack message
- Inbox 查询
- Thread scratchpad 读写
- MCP tools for Hermes profiles
- FastAPI + SQLite + Click CLI

## Quick Start

```bash
cd ~/code/hiveX
python3 -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn hivex.main:app --reload --port 8858
```

## API 概览

- `POST /api/auth/login`
- `GET /api/auth/me`
- `POST /api/profiles`
- `GET /api/profiles`
- `POST /api/threads/direct`
- `GET /api/threads`
- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}`
- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`
- `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`
- `GET /api/messages/inbox`
- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read`
- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack`
- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad`
- `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}`

## MCP Tools

- `get_inbox`
- `get_thread_messages`
- `send_message`
- `reply_thread`
- `mark_message_read`
- `ack_message`
- `get_scratchpad`
- `set_scratchpad_value`

## 当前定位

这是一个 **MVP foundation project**，目标是把 Hermes #344 的“真正多 agent 通信层”先落成可用原型，而不是一次性实现完整 DAG orchestration / coordinator / watchdog 全家桶。
''',
    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/docs/contracts/profile-communication-mvp.md': '''# hiveX Requirement Contract

- status: PASS
- ready_for_prd: true
- priority: must
- requirement_contract_path: docs/contracts/profile-communication-mvp.md

## objective
构建一个新的 Python 项目 `hiveX`，放在 `~/code/hiveX`，作为 Hermes 不同 profile 之间的通信层，让多个 profile 可以安全地互相发送消息、做 handoff，并在共享 thread 内维护 scratchpad，上层可用于承接 Hermes issue #344 的多 agent 协作能力。

## constraints
- 使用 Python 实现。
- 项目目录固定为 `~/code/hiveX`。
- 参考现有 `~/code/hive` 的 FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 模式，但不要把 hiveX 做成另一个 task board。
- 要结合 Hermes issue #344 的研究结论，至少覆盖 result passing / shared scratchpad 这两个层次。
- 需要提供可供 Hermes profile 使用的 MCP 接口。
- 需要有可执行测试。
- 遵守 feature branch 开发，不在 main 直接开发。

## acceptance_criteria
1. `~/code/hiveX` 存在一个可运行的 Python 项目，包含 `README.md`、`requirements.txt`、`pyproject.toml`。
2. FastAPI 应用可暴露 profile registry、thread/message、scratchpad、auth 相关 API。
3. 支持 admin 登录并创建 profile，profile 使用静态 access token 访问 API。
4. 支持两个 profile 之间创建 direct thread，并发送消息。
5. 接收方可查询 inbox，并把消息标记为 read / ack。
6. thread 支持 scratchpad 的读写，且参与方都能读取。
7. 提供 MCP server 与工具定义，至少覆盖 inbox、send/reply、read/ack、scratchpad 读写。
8. pytest 至少包含：auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad、MCP tool dispatch 的测试。
9. 测试在本地执行并明确汇报结果。

## non_goals
- 本次不实现完整 DAG workflow engine。
- 本次不实现多进程 watchdog / health daemon。
- 本次不实现跨平台 gateway 投递。
- 本次不做 Web UI。
- 本次不替代 Hive 的任务调度与 poller。

## risks_assumptions
- 假设 MVP 允许使用 SQLite 作为单机原型存储。
- 假设 Hermes profile 的注册由 admin 完成，而不是开放匿名自注册。
- 风险：如果把范围扩展到完整 multi-agent orchestrator，会显著放大复杂度与测试成本。
- 风险：MCP/tool 调用的真实 Hermes 集成未在本轮做端到端实机验证，只做 server/tool 级验证。

## ambiguities
- 不阻塞：thread 是否需要群组模式。MVP 先支持 group thread 数据模型，但重点验证 direct thread。
- 不阻塞：ack 时是否强制附带 note。MVP 设为可选。

## missing_fields
- none

    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/docs/prd/profile-communication-mvp.md': '''# hiveX Profile Communication MVP PRD

## 1. Background
Hermes 现在已有 `delegate_task`，但 issue #344 明确指出：现在更像“父 agent 派一次性子任务”，不是真正的 multi-agent。缺的是 profile 间可持续通信、结果传递和共享上下文层。现有 Hive 偏任务编排，不适合作为 profile 间通用通信层。

## 2. Problem Statement
Hermes 不同 profile 缺少一个统一、可寻址、可审计、可通过 MCP 原生调用的通信基础设施，导致多 profile 协作只能依赖外部消息平台、人工 relay，或把任务板硬当成消息总线。

## 3. Goals
- 提供 Hermes profile 间一对一/线程化通信能力。
- 提供 thread 级共享 scratchpad，支撑协作状态共享。
- 提供 MCP 工具，让 Hermes profile 能原生收件、发件、回复、确认消息。
- 保持实现简单，可作为 Hive 和未来 multi-agent orchestration 的基础模块。

## 4. Non-Goals
- 不实现完整多 agent DAG 调度。
- 不实现 UI dashboard。
- 不实现外部 IM 平台桥接。
- 不做复杂权限模型（如 org/team/ACL matrix）。

## 5. Users / Personas
- Hermes dispatcher/coordinator profile
- Hermes specialist worker profiles
- 管理员（admin），负责注册 profile 和发 token

## 6. User Stories
- 作为 coordinator profile，我希望给另一个 worker profile 发 handoff 消息，这样可以在 Hermes 内完成交接。
- 作为 worker profile，我希望查看自己的 inbox 并对消息 read/ack，这样协作状态可追踪。
- 作为多个协作 profile，我希望在同一个 thread 里共享 scratchpad，这样可以积累上下文，而不是来回复制粘贴。

## 7. Scope (In/Out)
### In
- Profile registry
- Auth
- Direct / group thread 数据模型
- Message send/read/ack
- Scratchpad
- MCP server + tools
- CLI（最小 admin/profile 操作）

### Out
- DAG orchestration
- watchdog / recovery engine
- frontend
- gateway integration

## 8. Functional Requirements
1. 系统必须允许 admin 登录并创建 profile。
2. 系统必须为新 profile 生成静态 access token，并仅在创建时返回一次。
3. profile 必须能够创建或复用 direct thread，并发送消息。
4. profile 必须只能访问自己参与的 thread、message、scratchpad。
5. 收件 profile 必须能查询 inbox，并把消息标记为 read 或 ack。
6. thread 必须支持 key-value scratchpad，并保留最后更新时间与操作者。
7. Hermes 必须可通过 MCP tools 调用上述核心能力。

## 9. Acceptance Criteria
- Given admin 凭据正确, when 调用登录接口, then 返回 bearer token。
- Given admin token, when 创建 profile, then 返回 profile 信息与一次性 access token。
- Given alpha 和 beta 两个 profile, when alpha 发送 direct message 给 beta, then beta 的 inbox 返回该消息且状态为 unread。
- Given beta 收到 unread 消息, when beta 调用 read, then 该消息在 beta inbox 中状态变为 read。
- Given beta 已读消息, when beta 调用 ack, then 该消息状态变为 acked。
- Given alpha/beta 属于同一 thread, when alpha 设置 scratchpad key, then beta 查询该 thread scratchpad 时能看到相同值。
- Given MCP server 已启动, when 调用工具 dispatch, then 对应 client 方法被调用并返回结构化结果。

## 10. Edge Cases / Failure Modes
- profile 向不存在的 recipient 发消息
- 非 thread 参与者读取 thread
- 重复创建 direct thread 时应复用已存在 thread
- ack/read 不属于自己的消息
- scratchpad key 覆盖更新

## 11. Security / Privacy / Permission Notes
- 所有 API 除 login 外都需要 Bearer token。
- Admin JWT 可管理全部 profile。
- Profile token 只能访问与自身相关资源。
- 不在日志中泄露完整 access token。

## 12. Rollout & Migration Notes
- 作为独立新项目交付，不影响现有 Hive。
- 后续可作为 Hive 或 Hermes multi-agent 扩展的依赖服务接入。

## 13. Metrics / Success Signals
- 两个 profile 能完成完整消息往返。
- scratchpad 可共享。
- MCP 工具可稳定调用。
- 测试全部通过。

## 14. Open Questions
- 后续是否需要把 thread/message 持久同步到 gateway 平台？
- 后续是否需要 workflow-level mailbox / queue 优先级？
''',
    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/docs/capability/profile-communication-mvp.md': '''# hiveX Capability Contract

## CAPABILITY
hiveX 为 Hermes profile 提供一个独立通信能力：profile 被注册为可寻址身份后，可以在受控 thread 中相互发送消息、做 handoff，并共享 thread 级 scratchpad，从而把 Hermes #344 里“多 agent 之间可沟通、可共享上下文”的基础设施先落地。

## CONSTRAINTS
- 这是 communication plane，不承担 Hive 的 task orchestration 职责。
- Admin 与 profile 使用不同认证机制：admin JWT、profile 静态 token。
- Profile 只能访问自己参与的 thread / receipt / scratchpad。
- Direct thread 需要幂等复用，避免同一 pair 产生大量重复 thread。
- Scratchpad 需要结构化 JSON 值，而不是只支持字符串。
- MCP 工具必须映射到稳定的 REST client 方法，避免在 tool handler 中写业务逻辑。

## IMPLEMENTATION CONTRACT
### actors
- admin
- sender profile
- recipient profile

### surfaces
- FastAPI REST API
- Click CLI
- MCP server (stdio)

### states and transitions
- receipt.status: unread -> read -> acked
- thread type: direct | group | handoff
- scratchpad key: create | update

### interface/data implications
- `profiles` 存储身份与 token
- `threads` + `thread_participants` 存储通信域
- `messages` + `receipts` 存储消息及投递状态
- `scratchpad_entries` 存储线程共享状态

## NON-GOALS
- coordinator routing
- workflow DAG execution
- health monitoring / retry orchestration
- gateway fan-out

## OPEN QUESTIONS
- 后续是否需要 message priority / SLA / retry policy
- 是否要把 scratchpad 提升为 workflow-scoped object，而不是 thread-scoped

## HANDOFF
已具备进入技术设计与 TDD 实现的条件。下一步：按 FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 的最小实现落地，并用 pytest 覆盖关键行为。
''',
    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/docs/design/profile-communication-mvp.md': '''# hiveX Technical Design

- design_owner: architect
- review_dependencies: [planner]
- status: PASS

## Overview
hiveX 采用与 Hive 类似的 FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 结构，但职责收敛为“通信基础设施”：提供 profile registry、threaded messaging、receipt 状态流转、thread scratchpad、以及 Hermes MCP 原生接入。

## Architecture

```text
Hermes Profile
   │
   │ MCP (stdio)
   ▼
hiveX MCP Server
   │
   │ HTTP
   ▼
hiveX FastAPI Server
   │
   ▼
SQLite
  - profiles
  - threads
  - thread_participants
  - messages
  - receipts
  - scratchpad_entries
```

### Why this shape
- 复用 Hive 已验证过的 FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 结构，降低实现风险。
- 与 Hermes issue #344 对齐：先做通信与共享上下文层，而不是一下做 coordinator + workflow engine。
- direct thread + receipt + scratchpad 足够支撑 result passing / shared scratchpad 两种协作模式。

## Interface/API Contracts
- `POST /api/auth/login` -> admin JWT
- `GET /api/auth/me` -> 当前身份
- `POST /api/profiles` -> admin 创建 profile，返回 access token（一次）
- `GET /api/profiles` -> profile 目录
- `POST /api/threads/direct` -> 创建/复用 direct thread
- `GET /api/threads` -> 当前 profile 的 thread 列表
- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}` -> thread 详情
- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread message stream
- `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread 发消息
- `GET /api/messages/inbox` -> 当前 profile inbox
- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read` -> 标记已读
- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack` -> 标记确认，可附带 note
- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad` -> 获取 scratchpad
- `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}` -> upsert scratchpad value

## Data Model Implications
### profiles
- `profile_id`
- `display_name`
- `capabilities` JSON
- `access_token`
- timestamps

### threads
- `thread_id`
- `thread_type`
- `subject`
- `created_by`
- `metadata` JSON

### thread_participants
- `thread_id`
- `profile_id`

### messages
- `message_id`
- `thread_id`
- `sender_id`
- `body`
- `message_type`
- `reply_to_message_id`
- `metadata` JSON

### receipts
- `message_id`
- `profile_id`
- `status`
- `read_at`
- `acked_at`

### scratchpad_entries
- `thread_id`
- `key`
- `value` JSON
- `updated_by`
- `updated_at`

## Security Considerations
- 所有非 login 接口均要求 Bearer token。
- Admin 拥有全局权限。
- Profile 必须校验 thread participation。
- 不返回完整 token 给非创建场景。
- ack/read 只能作用于当前 profile 的 receipt。

## Test Strategy
- integration: auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad
- unit: MCP tool dispatch
- access control: 非参与者读取 thread/message/scratchpad 应失败

## Rollout/Rollback
- 独立项目，无现网迁移。
- rollback = 停止服务并保留 sqlite 文件即可。

## Risks
- SQLite 单机模型不适合高并发，但适合 MVP。
- direct thread reuse 查询若实现草率，容易产生重复 thread。
- ack 时附带 note 会引入“副作用消息”，需要清晰建模。
''',

    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/tests/test_message_flow.py': '''import pytest


async def _login_admin(client):
    response = await client.post("/api/auth/login", json={"username": "admin", "password": "hivex2026"})
    return response.json()["token"]


async def _create_profile(client, admin_token: str, profile_id: str):
    response = await client.post(
        "/api/profiles",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {admin_token}"},
        json={
            "profile_id": profile_id,
            "display_name": profile_id.title(),
            "capabilities": ["communication"],
        },
    )
    return response.json()["access_token"]


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_direct_message_inbox_read_and_ack_flow(client):
    admin_token = await _login_admin(client)
    alpha_token = await _create_profile(client, admin_token, "alpha")
    beta_token = await _create_profile(client, admin_token, "beta")

    thread_response = await client.post(
        "/api/threads/direct",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {alpha_token}"},
        json={"recipient_id": "beta", "subject": "handoff"},
    )
    assert thread_response.status_code == 201
    thread_id = thread_response.json()["thread_id"]

    message_response = await client.post(
        f"/api/threads/{thread_id}/messages",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {alpha_token}"},
        json={"body": "please take over", "message_type": "handoff", "metadata": {"task": "344-mvp"}},
    )
    assert message_response.status_code == 201
    message_id = message_response.json()["message_id"]

    inbox = await client.get(
        "/api/messages/inbox",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {beta_token}"},
    )
    assert inbox.status_code == 200
    inbox_payload = inbox.json()
    assert len(inbox_payload) == 1
    assert inbox_payload[0]["message_id"] == message_id
    assert inbox_payload[0]["status"] == "unread"

    read_response = await client.post(
        f"/api/messages/{message_id}/read",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {beta_token}"},
    )
    assert read_response.status_code == 200
    assert read_response.json()["status"] == "read"

    ack_response = await client.post(
        f"/api/messages/{message_id}/ack",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {beta_token}"},
        json={"note": "received"},
    )
    assert ack_response.status_code == 200
    assert ack_response.json()["status"] == "acked"
''',
    '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/tests/test_scratchpad.py': '''import pytest


async def _login_admin(client):
    response = await client.post("/api/auth/login", json={"username": "admin", "password": "hivex2026"})
    return response.json()["token"]


async def _create_profile(client, admin_token: str, profile_id: str):
    response = await client.post(
        "/api/profiles",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {admin_token}"},
        json={
            "profile_id": profile_id,
            "display_name": profile_id.title(),
            "capabilities": ["communication"],
        },
    )
    return response.json()["access_token"]


@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_thread_scratchpad_is_shared_between_participants(client):
    admin_token = await _login_admin(client)
    alpha_token = await _create_profile(client, admin_token, "alpha")
    beta_token = await _create_profile(client, admin_token, "beta")

    thread_response = await client.post(
        "/api/threads/direct",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {alpha_token}"},
        json={"recipient_id": "beta", "subject": "shared-plan"},
    )
    thread_id = thread_response.json()["thread_id"]

    put_response = await client.put(
        f"/api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/plan",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {alpha_token}"},
        json={"value": {"step": 1, "owner": "alpha"}},
    )
    assert put_response.status_code == 200

    get_response = await client.get(
        f"/api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {beta_token}"},
    )
    assert get_response.status_code == 200
    payload = get_response.json()
    assert payload["plan"]["value"] == {"step": 1, "owner": "alpha"}

    async def mark_message_read(self, message_id: str):
        return {"message_id": message_id, "status": "read"}

    async def ack_message(self, message_id: str, note: str = ""):
        return {"message_id": message_id, "status": "acked", "note": note}

    async def get_scratchpad(self, thread_id: str):
        return {"thread_id": thread_id, "entries": {}}

    async def set_scratchpad_value(self, thread_id: str, key: str, value):
        return {"thread_id": thread_id, "key": key, "value": value}

[Subdirectory context discovered: code/hiveX/AGENTS.md]
# hiveX Project Agent Rules

## Mandatory Workflow

For new features, behavior changes, auth/API/DB/security work, follow the global Hermes skill `woos-development-workflow`:

1. Requirement Contract
2. Research & Reuse
3. PRD
4. Capability Contract
5. Technical Design
6. TDD / RED-GREEN-REFACTOR
7. Implementation
8. Verification
9. Independent Review

## Project Conventions

- Python project; prefer explicit typing where practical.
- Use pytest for tests.
- Keep API/auth behavior documented before implementation.
- Do not mark work complete unless tests were actually run.
- Preserve minimal focused diffs.

{"results": [{"task_index": 0, "status": "completed", "summary": "STATUS: REQUEST_CHANGES
SUMMARY: Reviewed `docs/prd/profile-communication-mvp.md` against `docs/contracts/profile-communication-mvp.md`. The PRD captures the core communication MVP well, but it is not fully planner-ready: several contract-required deliverables and verification details are missing or too implicit, and sequencing is not concrete enough for clean downstream design/TDD handoff. No files were created or modified.
KEY_FINDINGS:
- Scope is mostly aligned on admin/profile auth, direct messaging, inbox read/ack, scratchpad, and MCP integration; non-goals are also broadly consistent.
- The acceptance criteria are mostly scenario-based and testable for the main happy-path flows.
- The PRD introduces minimal CLI scope that is not in the contract; if kept, it should be explicitly marked optional or justified to avoid scope creep.
- Sequencing readiness is weak: the PRD does not break the work into implementation-ready slices such as auth/profile bootstrap → thread/message flow → scratchpad → MCP tools → verification.
BLOCKING_FINDINGS:
- The PRD does not explicitly carry forward contract-mandated delivery constraints and artifacts, including the fixed project location and required project files (`README.md`, `requirements.txt`, `pyproject.toml`), so final acceptance is underspecified.
- The contract requires the FastAPI + SQLite + MCP baseline, but the PRD does not explicitly lock in the FastAPI/SQLite implementation assumptions, leaving a key planning constraint too implicit.
- The contract requires executable local tests and explicit reporting of results; the PRD says tests should pass, but it does not make local pytest execution/reporting a clear acceptance gate.
- The verification plan is incomplete versus the contract: required test coverage for auth/profile registration, message flow, scratchpad, and MCP tool dispatch is not fully spelled out as a mandatory acceptance package.", "api_calls": 4, "duration_seconds": 171.56, "model": "gpt-5.4", "exit_reason": "completed", "tokens": {"input": 71635, "output": 2071}, "tool_trace": [{"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 80, "result_bytes": 2861, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 74, "result_bytes": 3653, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 217, "result_bytes": 18, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 83, "result_bytes": 18, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 195, "result_bytes": 18, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 75, "result_bytes": 62, "status": "ok"}]}, {"task_index": 1, "status": "completed", "summary": "STATUS: REQUEST_CHANGES
SUMMARY: PRD captures the MVP intent well, but it is not yet architecturally complete enough to safely drive implementation against the contract. The main gaps are missing explicit platform constraints (Python/FastAPI/SQLite/test deliverables), an under-specified auth/token model, and a data model ambiguity around message/read/ack semantics once group threads are in scope.

KEY_FINDINGS:
- PRD aligns with the contract on core product intent: profile registry, auth, direct messaging, inbox, scratchpad, and MCP tools are all present.
- Boundary is mostly correct: it avoids turning hiveX into a task board and keeps DAG orchestration, UI, watchdogs, and gateways out of scope.
- Security direction is partially defined, but not enough for implementation: bearer auth is stated, yet token lifecycle, storage, revocation/rotation, and admin bootstrap boundaries are unspecified.
- Data model implications are not fully resolved: direct/group thread support is listed, but message status semantics appear modeled as a single message state, which does not scale cleanly to per-recipient read/ack in group threads.
- Operational/API feasibility details are thin: no explicit FastAPI + SQLite constraint, no statement of Python project deliverables, and no explicit test matrix matching the contract’s required coverage.

BLOCKING_FINDINGS:
- PRD does not explicitly carry forward the contract’s required implementation constraints and deliverables: Python project in `~/code/hiveX`, FastAPI + SQLite + MCP pattern, and executable pytest coverage for auth/profile registration, message flow, scratchpad, and MCP dispatch.
- Auth architecture is under-specified for a security-sensitive service: it says profile tokens are generated once and not fully logged, but does not define whether tokens are stored hashed, how admin credentials are bootstrapped, or whether token revocation/rotation exists for compromised profiles.
- Group threads are in scope without a corresponding per-recipient receipt model; this creates a hidden schema/behavior risk because unread/read/acked cannot be represented correctly as a single thread/message-level status once more than two participants exist.", "api_calls": 3, "duration_seconds": 159.95, "model": "gpt-5.4", "exit_reason": "completed", "tokens": {"input": 53211, "output": 1384}, "tool_trace": [{"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 77, "result_bytes": 62, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 80, "result_bytes": 2861, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 74, "result_bytes": 3653, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 85, "result_bytes": 823, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 183, "result_bytes": 18, "status": "ok"}]}, {"task_index": 2, "status": "completed", "summary": "STATUS: REQUEST_CHANGES
SUMMARY: Reviewed `docs/design/profile-communication-mvp.md` against the linked PRD and capability contract. The core FastAPI + SQLite + MCP shape is a good MVP fit, but the design is not ready for gate because several contract-critical areas are underspecified or inconsistent: thread surface scope, MCP/CLI interface mapping, token security boundaries, and failure-path/test coverage. No files were modified.
KEY_FINDINGS:
- The overall architecture matches the PRD intent for a lightweight communication plane and is appropriately conservative for MVP.
- API/data model coverage is incomplete versus the stated scope: PRD/capability mention group/handoff semantics and MCP/CLI surfaces, but the design only specifies a direct-thread REST creation path and does not define MCP tool contracts or CLI responsibilities.
- The receipt lifecycle exists in the capability contract (`unread -> read -> acked`), but the design does not define invalid transitions, idempotency rules, or response behavior for repeated/out-of-order read/ack calls.
- Security boundaries are only partially specified: the data model stores `access_token` directly on `profiles`, with no at-rest protection, rotation/revocation story, or logging/audit boundary for admin-issued credentials.
- Test strategy is too thin for this gate: it covers happy-path integration and one access-control check, but not the PRD edge cases around nonexistent recipients, duplicate direct-thread races, unauthorized receipt mutation, scratchpad overwrite/concurrency, or auth boundary behavior across admin vs profile tokens.
BLOCKING_FINDINGS:
- The design is interface-inconsistent with the capability/PRD scope: thread types/surfaces are not concretely aligned (`direct | group | handoff` in capability vs only `/threads/direct` in design), so implementation would be forced to guess the supported MVP contract.
- The MCP/CLI layer is in scope and constrained by the capability contract, but the design does not specify tool names, REST client mapping, payload/response shapes, or handler boundaries; this is a cross-surface architecture gap.
- Storing profile `access_token` directly in the primary data model without a defined hashing/lookup strategy is an unacceptable security boundary for a design gate.
- Failure behavior for receipt transitions and direct-thread reuse is not concretely modeled or test-planned, creating high risk of inconsistent semantics and duplicate-thread bugs during implementation.", "api_calls": 5, "duration_seconds": 119.07, "model": "gpt-5.4", "exit_reason": "completed", "tokens": {"input": 103718, "output": 2136}, "tool_trace": [{"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 77, "result_bytes": 4283, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 74, "result_bytes": 3653, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 81, "result_bytes": 1818, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 204, "result_bytes": 2892, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 85, "result_bytes": 823, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 82, "result_bytes": 18, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 82, "result_bytes": 7251, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 104, "result_bytes": 18, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "search_files", "args_bytes": 214, "result_bytes": 943, "status": "ok"}, {"tool": "read_file", "args_bytes": 85, "result_bytes": 1745, "status": "ok"}]}], "total_duration_seconds": 173.37}

{"code":"from hermes_tools import read_file, write_file

updates = {}

# Patch PRD
prd_path = '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/docs/prd/profile-communication-mvp.md'
prd = read_file(prd_path)['content']
prd = prd.replace(
"## 4. Non-Goals\n- 不实现完整多 agent DAG 调度。\n- 不实现 UI dashboard。\n- 不实现外部 IM 平台桥接。\n- 不做复杂权限模型（如 org/team/ACL matrix）。",
"## 4. Non-Goals\n- 不实现完整多 agent DAG 调度。\n- 不实现 UI dashboard。\n- 不实现外部 IM 平台桥接。\n- 不做复杂权限模型（如 org/team/ACL matrix）。\n- 不在 MVP 中实现 token rotation / revoke API（先采用 admin 重新创建 profile 的运维替代策略，正式轮次再补）。"
)
prd = prd.replace(
"### In\n- Profile registry\n- Auth\n- Direct / group thread 数据模型\n- Message send/read/ack\n- Scratchpad\n- MCP server + tools\n- CLI（最小 admin/profile 操作）",
"### In\n- Profile registry\n- Auth\n- Direct thread MVP（数据模型预留 handoff / group 扩展位）\n- Message send/read/ack（以 per-recipient receipt 建模）\n- Scratchpad\n- MCP server + tools\n- Python 项目基础交付：`README.md`、`requirements.txt`、`pyproject.toml`\n- CLI（最小 admin/profile 操作，可选但不高于 API/MCP 优先级）"
)
prd = prd.replace(
"## 8. Functional Requirements\n1. 系统必须允许 admin 登录并创建 profile。\n2. 系统必须为新 profile 生成静态 access token，并仅在创建时返回一次。\n3. profile 必须能够创建或复用 direct thread，并发送消息。\n4. profile 必须只能访问自己参与的 thread、message、scratchpad。\n5. 收件 profile 必须能查询 inbox，并把消息标记为 read 或 ack。\n6. thread 必须支持 key-value scratchpad，并保留最后更新时间与操作者。\n7. Hermes 必须可通过 MCP tools 调用上述核心能力。",
"## 8. Functional Requirements\n1. 系统必须允许 admin 登录并创建 profile。\n2. 系统必须为新 profile 生成静态 access token，并仅在创建时返回一次。服务端不得明文回显历史 token。\n3. profile 必须能够创建或复用 direct thread，并发送消息。\n4. profile 必须只能访问自己参与的 thread、message、scratchpad。\n5. 收件 profile 必须能查询 inbox，并把消息标记为 read 或 ack。消息状态必须按 receipt（message_id + recipient_id）建模，而不是挂在 message 全局状态上。\n6. thread 必须支持 key-value scratchpad，并保留最后更新时间与操作者。\n7. Hermes 必须可通过 MCP tools 调用上述核心能力，tool handler 仅做 REST client mapping，不内嵌业务状态机。\n8. 实现固定采用 Python + FastAPI + SQLite + MCP 模式。"
)
prd = prd.replace(
"## 13. Metrics / Success Signals\n- 两个 profile 能完成完整消息往返。\n- scratchpad 可共享。\n- MCP 工具可稳定调用。\n- 测试全部通过。",
"## 13. Metrics / Success Signals\n- 两个 profile 能完成完整消息往返。\n- scratchpad 可共享。\n- MCP 工具可稳定调用。\n- 本地 `pytest` 覆盖 auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad、MCP dispatch，且全部通过。"
)
updates[prd_path] = prd

# Patch capability
cap_path = '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/docs/capability/profile-communication-mvp.md'
cap = read_file(cap_path)['content']
cap = cap.replace(
"- Admin 与 profile 使用不同认证机制：admin JWT、profile 静态 token。\n- Profile 只能访问自己参与的 thread / receipt / scratchpad。\n- Direct thread 需要幂等复用，避免同一 pair 产生大量重复 thread。\n- Scratchpad 需要结构化 JSON 值，而不是只支持字符串。\n- MCP 工具必须映射到稳定的 REST client 方法，避免在 tool handler 中写业务逻辑。",
"- Admin 与 profile 使用不同认证机制：admin JWT、profile 静态 token。\n- Profile token 在存储层以 hash 形式保存；明文 token 只在创建时回传一次。\n- Profile 只能访问自己参与的 thread / receipt / scratchpad。\n- Direct thread 需要幂等复用，避免同一 pair 产生大量重复 thread。\n- Receipt 状态按接收者建模：`unread -> read -> acked`。重复 read / ack 调用需幂等。\n- Scratchpad 需要结构化 JSON 值，而不是只支持字符串。\n- MCP 工具必须映射到稳定的 REST client 方法，避免在 tool handler 中写业务逻辑。"
)
cap = cap.replace(
"### surfaces\n- FastAPI REST API\n- Click CLI\n- MCP server (stdio)",
"### surfaces\n- FastAPI REST API\n- Click CLI（MVP 可最小化）\n- MCP server (stdio)"
)
updates[cap_path] = cap

# Patch design
design_path = '/Users/woosley/code/hiveX/docs/design/profile-communication-mvp.md'
design = read_file(design_path)['content']
design = design.replace(
"## Interface/API Contracts\n- `POST /api/auth/login` -> admin JWT\n- `GET /api/auth/me` -> 当前身份\n- `POST /api/profiles` -> admin 创建 profile，返回 access token（一次）\n- `GET /api/profiles` -> profile 目录\n- `POST /api/threads/direct` -> 创建/复用 direct thread\n- `GET /api/threads` -> 当前 profile 的 thread 列表\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}` -> thread 详情\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread message stream\n- `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread 发消息\n- `GET /api/messages/inbox` -> 当前 profile inbox\n- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read` -> 标记已读\n- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack` -> 标记确认，可附带 note\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad` -> 获取 scratchpad\n- `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}` -> upsert scratchpad value",
"## Interface/API Contracts\n- `POST /api/auth/login` -> admin JWT\n- `GET /api/auth/me` -> 当前身份\n- `POST /api/profiles` -> admin 创建 profile，返回 access token（一次）\n- `GET /api/profiles` -> profile 目录\n- `POST /api/threads/direct` -> 创建/复用 direct thread（MVP 唯一建 thread 入口）\n- `GET /api/threads` -> 当前 profile 的 thread 列表\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}` -> thread 详情\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread message stream\n- `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages` -> thread 发消息\n- `GET /api/messages/inbox` -> 当前 profile inbox\n- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read` -> 标记已读（幂等）\n- `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack` -> 标记确认（幂等，可附带 note）\n- `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad` -> 获取 scratchpad\n- `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}` -> upsert scratchpad value\n\n## MCP/API Mapping\n- `get_inbox` -> `GET /api/messages/inbox`\n- `get_thread_messages` -> `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`\n- `send_message` -> `POST /api/threads/direct` (get/create) + `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`\n- `reply_thread` -> `POST /api/threads/{thread_id}/messages`\n- `mark_message_read` -> `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/read`\n- `ack_message` -> `POST /api/messages/{message_id}/ack`\n- `get_scratchpad` -> `GET /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad`\n- `set_scratchpad_value` -> `PUT /api/threads/{thread_id}/scratchpad/{key}`"
)
design = design.replace(
"### profiles\n- `profile_id`\n- `display_name`\n- `capabilities` JSON\n- `access_token`\n- timestamps",
"### profiles\n- `profile_id`\n- `display_name`\n- `capabilities` JSON\n- `access_token_hash`\n- timestamps"
)
design = design.replace(
"### threads\n- `thread_id`\n- `thread_type`\n- `subject`\n- `created_by`\n- `metadata` JSON",
"### threads\n- `thread_id`\n- `thread_type` (`direct` in MVP; `handoff/group` reserved)\n- `subject`\n- `created_by`\n- `metadata` JSON"
)
design = design.replace(
"## Security Considerations\n- 所有非 login 接口均要求 Bearer token。\n- Admin 拥有全局权限。\n- Profile 必须校验 thread participation。\n- 不返回完整 token 给非创建场景。\n- ack/read 只能作用于当前 profile 的 receipt。",
"## Security Considerations\n- 所有非 login 接口均要求 Bearer token。\n- Admin 拥有全局权限。\n- Profile 必须校验 thread participation。\n- 服务端只保存 token hash，不保存可直接回放的明文 token。\n- 不返回完整 token 给非创建场景。\n- ack/read 只能作用于当前 profile 的 receipt。\n- 非法 read/ack、越权读取 thread/scratchpad 必须返回 403/404，而不是静默成功。"
)
design = design.replace(
"## Test Strategy\n- integration: auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad\n- unit: MCP tool dispatch\n- access control: 非参与者读取 thread/message/scratchpad 应失败",
"## Test Strategy\n- integration: auth/profile 注册、message flow、scratchpad\n- unit: MCP tool dispatch\n- access control: 非参与者读取 thread/message/scratchpad 应失败\n- edge cases: direct thread 重复创建应复用；重复 read/ack 应幂等；recipient 不存在应 404/400"
)
updates[design_path] = design

for path, content in updates.items():
    write_file(path, content)

print(f'Patched {len(updates)} docs')"}
